headline: Tesla CEO Elon Musk To Host 'Saturday Night Live' On May 8
summary: One of the most well-known names in the stock market will be a host of "Saturday Night Live" in May and could bring a new viewers to the long-running NBC show.

headline: What to Expect From Tesla's Q1 Earnings Report On Monday
summary: EV giant Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) is scheduled to release its first-quarter results Monday, after the market close.

headline: Could Netflix Help Shares Of Formula One?
summary:
One of the most popular sports in the world is Formula One, but the racing league does not attract the same viewership numbers in the U.S. as it does in other markets.

That could be changing thanks to a docuseries on Netflix.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Apple, Boeing, Intel, Netflix, Tesla And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The past week's bullish calls included the iPhone maker, clean energy stocks and an aerospace giant.

headline: How Bitclout Aims To Let People Bet On Twitter Influencers Using 'Creator Coins'
summary: A new social network that allows followers to buy tokens in accounts is taking the world by storm. The network, called Bitclout, has seen interest from large investors, athletes, celebrities, retail traders and creators.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (April 25-May 1): FDA Decisions For Sol-Gel, Protalix Bio, Ardelyx
summary: Biopharma stocks came back from the weakness seen in the first two sessions to close the week ended April 23 higher.

headline: Is ARK Invest's Cathie Wood Interested In Nio?
summary: NIO Inc. (NYSE: NIO) shares are seeing a nice upward bounce, and on a technical level the stock is signaling a reversal of a recent downtrend.
